studies.title: Health Economic Evaluation of  costs and benefits of a computer based program called "Deprexis" used for insured persons of the DAK (statutory health insurance) suffering from depression

_verification.reason: The study explicitly mentions 'Deprexis' by name in the title and describes it as a computer-based program used for individuals suffering from depression, which matches the description of the digital therapeutic product 'deprexis' by GAIA AG. The clinical area aligns with the ICD-10 codes provided for deprexis.

_classification.reason: The study focuses on a health economic evaluation of a program used by insured persons, which suggests an observational or real-world context rather than an interventional randomized design. No indicators of randomization, blinding, or placebo control are mentioned.
